Nullpointer exception for if-else statement having an empty THEN block

    }

* Relevant parts of the `.editorconfig` settings
* Name and version (or code for custom task) of integration used (Gradle plugin, Maven plugin, command line, custom Gradle task): Custom Gradle task
* Version of Gradle used (if applicable): 8.2.1
* Operating System and version: macOS

>```
>     if ("a" == "b") {
>     } else if ("b" == "c") else {
>     }
>```

 31→/**
 32→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#formatting-control-flow-statements
 33→ */
 34→public class MultiLineIfElseRule :
 35→    StandardRule(
 36→        id = "multiline-if-else",
 37→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 38→            setOf(
 39→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 40→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 41→            ),
 42→    ) {
 43→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 44→
 45→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 46→        indentConfig =
 47→            IndentConfig(
 48→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 49→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 50→            )
 51→    }
 52→
 53→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 54→        node: ASTNode,
 55→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 56→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 57→    ) {
 58→        if (node.elementType != THEN && node.elementType != ELSE) {
 59→            return
 60→        }
 61→
 62→        // Ignore when already wrapped in a block
 63→        if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 64→            return
 65→        }
 66→
 67→        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 68→            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION &&
 69→            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 70→        ) {
 71→            // Allow
 72→            // val foo2 = if (bar1) {
 73→            //     "bar1"
 74→            // } else if (bar2) {
 75→            //     null
 76→            // } else {
 77→            //     null
 78→            // } ?: "something-else"
 79→            return
 80→        }
 81→
 82→        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 83→            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION &&
 84→            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 85→        ) {
 86→            // Allow
 87→            // val foo = if (bar1) {
 88→            //     "bar1"
 89→            // } else if (bar2) {
 90→            //     "bar2"
 91→            // } else {
 92→            //     "bar3"
 93→            // }.plus("foo")
 94→            return
 95→        }
 96→
 97→        if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 98→            if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF) {
 99→                // Allow single line for:
100→                // else if (...)
101→                return
102→            }
103→            if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
104→                // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
105→                //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
106→                //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
107→                return
108→            }
109→
110→            Unit
111→        }
112→
113→        emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
114→        if (autoCorrect) {
115→            autocorrect(node)
116→        }
117→    }
118→
119→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
120→        val prevLeaves =
121→            node
122→                .leaves(forward = false)
123→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
124→                .toList()
125→                .reversed()
126→        val nextLeaves =
127→            node
128→                .leaves(forward = true)
129→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
130→                .toList()
131→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
132→
133→        prevLeaves
134→            .firstOrNull()
135→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
136→            ?.let {
137→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
138→            }
139→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
140→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
141→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
142→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
143→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)))
144→            prevLeaves
145→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
146→                .forEach(::addChild)
147→            addChild(previousChild)
148→            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
149→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
150→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
151→        }
152→
153→        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
154→        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
155→            node
156→                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
157→                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
158→        }
159→    }
160→}

 30→/**
 31→ * All branches of the if-statement should be wrapped between braces if at least one branch is wrapped between braces. Consistent bracing
 32→ * makes statements easier to read.
 33→ */
 34→public class IfElseBracingRule :
 35→    StandardRule(
 36→        id = "if-else-bracing",
 37→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 38→            setOf(
 39→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 40→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 41→            ),
 42→    ),
 43→    Rule.Experimental,
 44→    Rule.OfficialCodeStyle {
 45→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 46→
 47→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 48→        indentConfig =
 49→            IndentConfig(
 50→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 51→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 52→            )
 53→    }
 54→
 55→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 56→        node: ASTNode,
 57→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 58→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 59→    ) {
 60→        if (node.elementType == IF) {
 61→            visitIfStatement(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 62→        }
 63→    }
 64→
 65→    private fun visitIfStatement(
 66→        node: ASTNode,
 67→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 68→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 69→    ) {
 70→        val thenNode =
 71→            requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(THEN)) {
 72→                "Can not find THEN branch in IF"
 73→            }
 74→        val elseNode = node.findChildByType(ELSE) ?: return
 75→        val parentIfBracing =
 76→            node
 77→                .treeParent
 78→                .takeIf { it.elementType == ELSE }
 79→                ?.treeParent
 80→                ?.hasBracing()
 81→                ?: false
 82→        val thenBracing = thenNode.hasBracing()
 83→        val elseBracing = elseNode.hasBracing()
 84→        if (parentIfBracing || thenBracing || elseBracing) {
 85→            if (!thenBracing) {
 86→                visitBranchWithoutBraces(thenNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 87→            }
 88→            if (!elseBracing) {
 89→                if (elseNode.firstChildNode?.elementType != IF) {
 90→                    visitBranchWithoutBraces(elseNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 91→                } else {
 92→                    // Postpone changing the else-if until that node is being processed
 93→                }
 94→            }
 95→        }
 96→    }
 97→
 98→    private fun ASTNode?.hasBracing(): Boolean =
 99→        when {
100→            this == null -> {
101→                false
102→            }
103→            this.elementType == BLOCK -> {
104→                true
105→            }
106→            this.elementType == IF -> {
107→                findChildByType(THEN).hasBracing() || findChildByType(ELSE).hasBracing()
108→            }
109→            else -> {
110→                this.firstChildNode.hasBracing()
111→            }
112→        }

122→            true,
123→        )
124→        if (autoCorrect) {

128→    }

Now I understand the issue better. Looking at the error and the code, I can see that line 98 in `MultiLineIfElseRule.kt` tries to access `node.firstChildNode.elementType` without a null check. This causes a NullPointerException when the THEN or ELSE block is empty.

Let me examine the code more carefully:

function.name: read
function.arguments: {"file_path":"/project/ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/MultiLineIfElseRule.kt","offset":93}

content.text:
Now I can see the issue clearly. The problem is that when a THEN or ELSE block is empty (like in the malformed code `} else if ("b" == "c") else {`), the `firstChildNode` is null, but the code doesn't check for this before accessing it.

Line 98 tries to access `node.firstChildNode.elementType` without checking if `firstChildNode` is null first, which causes the NPE.

The fix is to check if `firstChildNode` is null before accessing it. When there's an empty THEN or ELSE block, we should skip processing to avoid the crash.

Let me fix the `MultiLineIfElseRule.kt`:

 34→public class MultiLineIfElseRule :

 54→        node: ASTNode,
 55→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 56→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 57→    ) {
 58→        if (node.elementType != THEN && node.elementType != ELSE) {
 59→            return
 60→        }
 61→
 62→        // Ignore when already wrapped in a block
 63→        if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 64→            return
 65→        }
 66→
 67→        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 68→            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION &&
 69→            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 70→        ) {
 71→            // Allow
 72→            // val foo2 = if (bar1) {
 73→            //     "bar1"

 77→            //     null
 78→            // } ?: "something-else"
 79→            return

 83→            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION &&
 84→            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 85→        ) {
 86→            // Allow

 88→            //     "bar1"

 90→            //     "bar2"
 91→            // } else {
 92→            //     "bar3"
 93→            // }.plus("foo")
 94→            return
 95→        }
 96→
 97→        if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 98→            if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF) {
 99→                // Allow single line for:
100→                // else if (...)
101→                return
102→            }
103→            if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
104→                // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
105→                //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
106→                //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
107→                return

119→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
120→        val prevLeaves =
121→            node
122→                .leaves(forward = false)
123→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
124→                .toList()
125→                .reversed()

127→            node
128→                .leaves(forward = true)
129→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
130→                .toList()
131→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }

 29→
 30→/**
 31→ * All branches of the if-statement should be wrapped between braces if at least one branch is wrapped between braces. Consistent bracing
 32→ * makes statements easier to read.
 33→ */
 34→public class IfElseBracingRule :
 35→    StandardRule(
 36→        id = "if-else-bracing",
 37→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 38→            setOf(
 39→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 40→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 41→            ),
 42→    ),
 43→    Rule.Experimental,
 44→    Rule.OfficialCodeStyle {
 45→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 46→
 47→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 48→        indentConfig =
 49→            IndentConfig(
 50→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 51→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 52→            )
 53→    }
 54→
 55→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 56→        node: ASTNode,
 57→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 58→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 59→    ) {
 60→        if (node.elementType == IF) {
 61→            visitIfStatement(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 62→        }
 63→    }
 64→
 65→    private fun visitIfStatement(
 66→        node: ASTNode,
 67→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 68→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 69→    ) {
 70→        val thenNode =
 71→            requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(THEN)) {
 72→                "Can not find THEN branch in IF"
 73→            }
 74→        val elseNode = node.findChildByType(ELSE) ?: return
 75→        val parentIfBracing =
 76→            node
 77→                .treeParent
 78→                .takeIf { it.elementType == ELSE }
 79→                ?.treeParent
 80→                ?.hasBracing()
 81→                ?: false
 82→        val thenBracing = thenNode.hasBracing()
 83→        val elseBracing = elseNode.hasBracing()
 84→        if (parentIfBracing || thenBracing || elseBracing) {
 85→            if (!thenBracing) {
 86→                visitBranchWithoutBraces(thenNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 87→            }
 88→            if (!elseBracing) {
 89→                if (elseNode.firstChildNode?.elementType != IF) {
 90→                    visitBranchWithoutBraces(elseNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 91→                } else {
 92→                    // Postpone changing the else-if until that node is being processed
 93→                }
 94→            }
 95→        }
 96→    }
 97→
 98→    private fun ASTNode?.hasBracing(): Boolean =
 99→        when {
100→            this == null -> {
101→                false
102→            }
103→            this.elementType == BLOCK -> {
104→                true
105→            }
106→            this.elementType == IF -> {
107→                findChildByType(THEN).hasBracing() || findChildByType(ELSE).hasBracing()
108→            }
109→            else -> {
110→                this.firstChildNode.hasBracing()
111→            }
112→        }
113→
114→    private fun visitBranchWithoutBraces(
115→        node: ASTNode,
116→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
117→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
118→    ): Boolean {
119→        emit(
120→            node.firstChildNode.startOffset,
121→            "All branches of the if statement should be wrapped between braces if at least one branch is wrapped between braces",
122→            true,
123→        )
124→        if (autoCorrect) {
125→            autocorrect(node)
126→        }
127→        return true
128→    }
129→
130→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
131→        val prevLeaves =
132→            node
133→                .leaves(forward = false)
134→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
135→                .toList()
136→                .reversed()
137→        val nextLeaves =
138→            node
139→                .leaves(forward = true)
140→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
141→                .toList()
142→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
143→
144→        prevLeaves
145→            .firstOrNull()
146→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
147→            ?.let {
148→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
149→            }
150→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
151→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
152→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
153→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
154→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)))
155→            prevLeaves
156→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
157→                .forEach(::addChild)
158→            addChild(previousChild)
159→            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
160→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
161→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
162→        }
163→
164→        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
165→        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
166→            node
167→                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
168→                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
169→        }
170→    }
171→}

 26→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.PsiWhiteSpaceImpl
 27→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtBlockExpression
 28→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves
 29→
 30→/**
 31→ * All branches of the if-statement should be wrapped between braces if at least one branch is wrapped between braces. Consistent bracing
 32→ * makes statements easier to read.
 33→ */
 34→public class IfElseBracingRule :
 35→    StandardRule(
 36→        id = "if-else-bracing",
 37→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 38→            setOf(
 39→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 40→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 41→            ),
 42→    ),
 43→    Rule.Experimental,
 44→    Rule.OfficialCodeStyle {
 45→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 46→
 47→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 48→        indentConfig =
 49→            IndentConfig(
 50→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 51→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 52→            )
 53→    }
 54→
 55→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 56→        node: ASTNode,
 57→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 58→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 59→    ) {
 60→        if (node.elementType == IF) {
 61→            visitIfStatement(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 62→        }
 63→    }
 64→
 65→    private fun visitIfStatement(
 66→        node: ASTNode,
 67→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 68→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 69→    ) {
 70→        val thenNode =
 71→            requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(THEN)) {
 72→                "Can not find THEN branch in IF"
 73→            }
 74→        val elseNode = node.findChildByType(ELSE) ?: return
 75→        val parentIfBracing =
 76→            node
 77→                .treeParent
 78→                .takeIf { it.elementType == ELSE }
 79→                ?.treeParent
 80→                ?.hasBracing()
 81→                ?: false
 82→        val thenBracing = thenNode.hasBracing()
 83→        val elseBracing = elseNode.hasBracing()
 84→        if (parentIfBracing || thenBracing || elseBracing) {
 85→            if (!thenBracing) {
 86→                visitBranchWithoutBraces(thenNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 87→            }
 88→            if (!elseBracing) {
 89→                if (elseNode.firstChildNode?.elementType != IF) {
 90→                    visitBranchWithoutBraces(elseNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 91→                } else {
 92→                    // Postpone changing the else-if until that node is being processed
 93→                }
 94→            }
 95→        }
 96→    }
 97→
 98→    private fun ASTNode?.hasBracing(): Boolean =
 99→        when {
100→            this == null -> {
101→                false
102→            }
103→            this.elementType == BLOCK -> {
104→                true
105→            }
106→            this.elementType == IF -> {
107→                findChildByType(THEN).hasBracing() || findChildByType(ELSE).hasBracing()
108→            }
109→            else -> {
110→                this.firstChildNode.hasBracing()
111→            }
112→        }
113→
114→    private fun visitBranchWithoutBraces(
115→        node: ASTNode,
116→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
117→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
118→    ): Boolean {
119→        // Don't process branches that are empty (firstChildNode is null).
120→        // This can happen when there's malformed code like:
121→        // if (x) { } else if (y) else { }
122→        if (node.firstChildNode == null) {
123→            return false
124→        }
125→        emit(
126→            node.firstChildNode.startOffset,
127→            "All branches of the if statement should be wrapped between braces if at least one branch is wrapped between braces",
128→            true,
129→        )
130→        if (autoCorrect) {
131→            autocorrect(node)
132→        }
133→        return true
134→    }
135→
136→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
137→        val prevLeaves =
138→            node
139→                .leaves(forward = false)
140→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
141→                .toList()
142→                .reversed()
143→        val nextLeaves =
144→            node
145→                .leaves(forward = true)
146→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
147→                .toList()
148→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
149→
150→        prevLeaves
151→            .firstOrNull()
152→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
153→            ?.let {
154→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
155→            }
156→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
157→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
158→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
159→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
160→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)))
161→            prevLeaves
162→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
163→                .forEach(::addChild)
164→            addChild(previousChild)
165→            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
166→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
167→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
168→        }
169→
170→        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
171→        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
172→            node
173→                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
174→                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
175→        }
176→    }
177→}
178→
179→public val IF_ELSE_BRACING_RULE_ID: RuleId = IfElseBracingRule().ruleId

 45→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {

 53→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 54→        node: ASTNode,
 55→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 56→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 57→    ) {
 58→        if (node.elementType != THEN && node.elementType != ELSE) {
 59→            return
 60→        }
 61→
 62→        // Ignore when already wrapped in a block
 63→        if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 64→            return
 65→        }
 66→
 67→        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 68→            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION &&
 69→            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 70→        ) {

 72→            // val foo2 = if (bar1) {
 73→            //     "bar1"
 74→            // } else if (bar2) {
 75→            //     null
 76→            // } else {
 77→            //     null

 79→            return

 84→            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 85→        ) {

 89→            // } else if (bar2) {
 90→            //     "bar2"
 91→            // } else {
 92→            //     "bar3"
 93→            // }.plus("foo")
 94→            return
 95→        }

 98→            if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF) {
 99→                // Allow single line for:
100→                // else if (...)
101→                return

104→                // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)

 30→/**
 31→ * All branches of the if-statement should be wrapped between braces if at least one branch is wrapped between braces. Consistent bracing
 32→ * makes statements easier to read.
 33→ */
 34→public class IfElseBracingRule :
 35→    StandardRule(
 36→        id = "if-else-bracing",
 37→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 38→            setOf(
 39→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 40→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 41→            ),
 42→    ),
 43→    Rule.Experimental,
 44→    Rule.OfficialCodeStyle {
 45→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 46→
 47→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 48→        indentConfig =
 49→            IndentConfig(
 50→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 51→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 52→            )
 53→    }
 54→
 55→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 56→        node: ASTNode,
 57→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 58→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 59→    ) {
 60→        if (node.elementType == IF) {
 61→            visitIfStatement(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 62→        }
 63→    }
 64→
 65→    private fun visitIfStatement(
 66→        node: ASTNode,
 67→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 68→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 69→    ) {
 70→        val thenNode =
 71→            requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(THEN)) {
 72→                "Can not find THEN branch in IF"
 73→            }
 74→        val elseNode = node.findChildByType(ELSE) ?: return
 75→        val parentIfBracing =
 76→            node
 77→                .treeParent
 78→                .takeIf { it.elementType == ELSE }
 79→                ?.treeParent
 80→                ?.hasBracing()
 81→                ?: false
 82→        val thenBracing = thenNode.hasBracing()
 83→        val elseBracing = elseNode.hasBracing()
 84→        if (parentIfBracing || thenBracing || elseBracing) {
 85→            if (!thenBracing) {
 86→                visitBranchWithoutBraces(thenNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 87→            }
 88→            if (!elseBracing) {
 89→                if (elseNode.firstChildNode?.elementType != IF) {
 90→                    visitBranchWithoutBraces(elseNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 91→                } else {
 92→                    // Postpone changing the else-if until that node is being processed
 93→                }
 94→            }
 95→        }
 96→    }
 97→
 98→    private fun ASTNode?.hasBracing(): Boolean =
 99→        when {
100→            this == null -> {
101→                false
102→            }
103→            this.elementType == BLOCK -> {
104→                true
105→            }
106→            this.elementType == IF -> {
107→                findChildByType(THEN).hasBracing() || findChildByType(ELSE).hasBracing()
108→            }
109→            else -> {
110→                this.firstChildNode.hasBracing()
111→            }
112→        }

116→        autoCorrect: Boolean,

118→    ): Boolean {
119→        emit(
120→            node.firstChildNode.startOffset,
121→            "All branches of the if statement should be wrapped between braces if at least one branch is wrapped between braces",
122→            true,
123→        )
124→        if (autoCorrect) {
125→            autocorrect(node)

128→    }

 34→public class MultiLineIfElseRule :

 36→        id = "multiline-if-else",
 37→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 38→            setOf(

 40→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,

 47→            IndentConfig(

 53→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 54→        node: ASTNode,
 55→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 56→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 57→    ) {
 58→        if (node.elementType != THEN && node.elementType != ELSE) {
 59→            return
 60→        }
 61→
 62→        // Ignore when already wrapped in a block
 63→        if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 64→            return
 65→        }
 66→
 67→        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 68→            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION &&
 69→            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 70→        ) {
 71→            // Allow
 72→            // val foo2 = if (bar1) {
 73→            //     "bar1"
 74→            // } else if (bar2) {
 75→            //     null
 76→            // } else {
 77→            //     null
 78→            // } ?: "something-else"
 79→            return
 80→        }
 81→
 82→        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 83→            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION &&
 84→            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 85→        ) {
 86→            // Allow
 87→            // val foo = if (bar1) {
 88→            //     "bar1"
 89→            // } else if (bar2) {
 90→            //     "bar2"
 91→            // } else {
 92→            //     "bar3"
 93→            // }.plus("foo")
 94→            return
 95→        }
 96→
 97→        if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 98→            if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF) {
 99→                // Allow single line for:
100→                // else if (...)
101→                return
102→            }
103→            if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
104→                // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
105→                //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
106→                //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
107→                return
108→            }

119→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
120→        val prevLeaves =
121→            node
122→                .leaves(forward = false)
123→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
124→                .toList()
125→                .reversed()
126→        val nextLeaves =
127→            node
128→                .leaves(forward = true)
129→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
130→                .toList()
131→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
132→
133→        prevLeaves
134→            .firstOrNull()
135→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
136→            ?.let {
137→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
138→            }
139→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
140→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
141→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
142→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
143→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)))
144→            prevLeaves
145→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
146→                .forEach(::addChild)
147→            addChild(previousChild)
148→            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
149→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
150→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))

154→        if (node.elementType == THEN) {

 36→        id = "if-else-bracing",
 37→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 38→            setOf(

 40→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 41→            ),

 47→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 48→        indentConfig =
 49→            IndentConfig(
 50→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 51→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 52→            )
 53→    }
 54→
 55→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 56→        node: ASTNode,
 57→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 58→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 59→    ) {
 60→        if (node.elementType == IF) {
 61→            visitIfStatement(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 62→        }
 63→    }
 64→
 65→    private fun visitIfStatement(
 66→        node: ASTNode,
 67→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 68→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 69→    ) {
 70→        val thenNode =
 71→            requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(THEN)) {
 72→                "Can not find THEN branch in IF"
 73→            }
 74→        val elseNode = node.findChildByType(ELSE) ?: return
 75→        val parentIfBracing =
 76→            node
 77→                .treeParent
 78→                .takeIf { it.elementType == ELSE }
 79→                ?.treeParent
 80→                ?.hasBracing()
 81→                ?: false
 82→        val thenBracing = thenNode.hasBracing()
 83→        val elseBracing = elseNode.hasBracing()
 84→        if (parentIfBracing || thenBracing || elseBracing) {
 85→            if (!thenBracing) {
 86→                visitBranchWithoutBraces(thenNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 87→            }
 88→            if (!elseBracing) {
 89→                if (elseNode.firstChildNode?.elementType != IF) {
 90→                    visitBranchWithoutBraces(elseNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 91→                } else {
 92→                    // Postpone changing the else-if until that node is being processed
 93→                }
 94→            }
 95→        }
 96→    }

 98→    private fun ASTNode?.hasBracing(): Boolean =
 99→        when {
100→            this == null -> {
101→                false
102→            }
103→            this.elementType == BLOCK -> {
104→                true
105→            }
106→            this.elementType == IF -> {
107→                findChildByType(THEN).hasBracing() || findChildByType(ELSE).hasBracing()
108→            }
109→            else -> {
110→                this.firstChildNode.hasBracing()
111→            }
112→        }

114→    private fun visitBranchWithoutBraces(
115→        node: ASTNode,
116→        autoCorrect: Boolean,

118→    ): Boolean {
119→        emit(
120→            node.firstChildNode.startOffset,
121→            "All branches of the if statement should be wrapped between braces if at least one branch is wrapped between braces",
122→            true,
123→        )
124→        if (autoCorrect) {
125→            autocorrect(node)
126→        }
127→        return true
128→    }

131→        val prevLeaves =
132→            node
133→                .leaves(forward = false)
134→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
135→                .toList()
136→                .reversed()
137→        val nextLeaves =
138→            node
139→                .leaves(forward = true)
140→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
141→                .toList()
142→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
143→
144→        prevLeaves
145→            .firstOrNull()
146→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
147→            ?.let {
148→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
149→            }
150→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
151→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
152→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
153→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
154→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)))

156→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
157→                .forEach(::addChild)
158→            addChild(previousChild)

 50→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 51→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 52→            )
 53→    }
 54→
 55→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 56→        node: ASTNode,
 57→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 58→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 59→    ) {
 60→        if (node.elementType == IF) {
 61→            visitIfStatement(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 62→        }
 63→    }
 64→
 65→    private fun visitIfStatement(
 66→        node: ASTNode,
 67→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 68→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 69→    ) {
 70→        val thenNode =
 71→            requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(THEN)) {
 72→                "Can not find THEN branch in IF"
 73→            }
 74→        val elseNode = node.findChildByType(ELSE) ?: return
 75→        val parentIfBracing =
 76→            node
 77→                .treeParent
 78→                .takeIf { it.elementType == ELSE }
 79→                ?.treeParent
 80→                ?.hasBracing()
 81→                ?: false
 82→        val thenBracing = thenNode.hasBracing()
 83→        val elseBracing = elseNode.hasBracing()
 84→        if (parentIfBracing || thenBracing || elseBracing) {
 85→            if (!thenBracing) {
 86→                visitBranchWithoutBraces(thenNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 87→            }
 88→            if (!elseBracing) {
 89→                if (elseNode.firstChildNode?.elementType != IF) {
 90→                    visitBranchWithoutBraces(elseNode, autoCorrect, emit)
 91→                } else {
 92→                    // Postpone changing the else-if until that node is being processed
 93→                }
 94→            }
 95→        }
 96→    }
 97→
 98→    private fun ASTNode?.hasBracing(): Boolean =
 99→        when {
100→            this == null -> {
101→                false
102→            }
103→            this.elementType == BLOCK -> {
104→                true
105→            }
106→            this.elementType == IF -> {
107→                findChildByType(THEN).hasBracing() || findChildByType(ELSE).hasBracing()
108→            }
109→            else -> {
110→                this.firstChildNode.hasBracing()
111→            }
112→        }
113→
114→    private fun visitBranchWithoutBraces(
115→        node: ASTNode,
116→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
117→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
118→    ): Boolean {
119→        // Don't process branches that are empty (firstChildNode is null).
120→        // This can happen when there's malformed code like:
121→        // if (x) { } else if (y) else { }
122→        if (node.firstChildNode == null) {
123→            return false
124→        }
125→        emit(
126→            node.firstChildNode.startOffset,
127→            "All branches of the if statement should be wrapped between braces if at least one branch is wrapped between braces",
128→            true,
129→        )
130→        if (autoCorrect) {
131→            autocorrect(node)
132→        }
133→        return true
134→    }
135→
136→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
137→        val prevLeaves =
138→            node
139→                .leaves(forward = false)
140→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
141→                .toList()
142→                .reversed()
143→        val nextLeaves =
144→            node
145→                .leaves(forward = true)
146→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
147→                .toList()
148→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
149→
150→        prevLeaves
151→            .firstOrNull()
152→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
153→            ?.let {
154→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
155→            }
156→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
157→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
158→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
159→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
160→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)))
161→            prevLeaves
162→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
163→                .forEach(::addChild)
164→            addChild(previousChild)
165→            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
166→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
167→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
168→        }
169→
170→        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
171→        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
172→            node
173→                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
174→                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
175→        }
176→    }
177→}
